summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CSV Import feature for TradeLedger. All backend API tests (14/14) passed and UI tests verified successfully. Import endpoint working correctly with duplicate prevention, symbol normalization, and P&L preservation.

issues: Minor console warning: Missing Description for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggested

passed_tests: CSV Import API requires authentication (401/403 without token) - ✅
CSV Import rejects non-CSV files (400 status) - ✅
CSV Import accepts valid CSV files (200 status) - ✅
Duplicate prevention: Second import of same CSV skips all duplicates (0 new imports) - ✅
Symbol normalization: XAUUSDm -> XAU/USD, XAGUSDm -> XAG/USD - ✅
P&L values from CSV profit_usd column preserved correctly (e.g., -229.57, 41.94) - ✅
Trade notes include 'Imported from CSV - Ticket #XXXXX' - ✅
Lot sizes preserved from CSV lots column - ✅
Trade positions (buy/sell) correctly imported from type column - ✅
Dashboard stats updated: 585 trades, 77.61% win rate, -$6,212.19 P&L - ✅
Import dialog UI opens correctly with file upload area - ✅
Supported columns documentation visible in dialog - ✅
Journal page displays all imported trades - ✅
seed_data_creation: Test user importtest@test.com with 585 imported trades from /app/test_import.csv
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV import feature fully tested. Test user importtest@test.com has 585 trades imported from the sample CSV. Duplicate prevention confirmed working - re-importing same CSV produces 0 new records. Symbol normalization maps broker symbols (XAUUSDm, XAGUSDm, BTCUSDm) to app format (XAU/USD, XAG/USD, BTC/USD).
